languages.text: "Что... ты делаешь? Это кощунственное нарушение литании активации. Это... ересь..." {n}Голос Паскаля становится тихим, хриплым от статики... зачарованно любопытным и испуганным. Мехадендрит беспомощно клацает клешнями.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Что... ты делаешь? Это кощунственное нарушение литании активации. Это... ересь..." {n}Голос Паскаля становится тихим, хриплым от статики... зачарованно любопытным и испуганным. Механодендрит беспомощно клацает клешнями.{/n}
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Что... ты делаешь? Это кощунственное нарушение литании активации. Это... ересь..." {n}Голос Паскаля становится тихим, хриплым от статики... зачарованно любопытным и испуганным. Мехадендрит беспомощно клацает клешнями.{/n}
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "What... are you doing? This is a sacrilegious breach of the Litany of Activation. This is... heresy..." {n}Pasqal's voice grows quiet and hoarse with static, frightened and meek with fascination. The mechadendrite helplessly snaps its claws.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "What... are you doing? This is a sacrilegious breach of the Litany of Activation. This... is heresy..." {n}Pascal's voice grows quiet and hoarse with static, frightened and meek with fascination. The mechanodendrite is helplessly snapping is claws.{/n}
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.locale_text: "What... are you doing? This is a sacrilegious breach of the Litany of Activation. This is... heresy..." {n}Pasqal's voice grows quiet and hoarse with static, frightened and meek with fascination. The mechadendrite helplessly snaps its claws.{/n}
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

traits.locale_text: "What... are you doing? This is a sacrilegious breach of the Litany of Activation. This is... heresy..." {n}Pasqal's voice grows quiet and hoarse with static, frightened and meek with fascination. The mechadendrite helplessly snaps its claws.{/n}
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "Was... tun Sie da? Das ist ein frevelhafter Verstoß gegen die Litanei der Aktivierung. Das ist... Ketzerei..." {n}Pasqals Stimme wird leise und heiser vor Rauschen, erschrocken und kleinlaut vor Faszination. Der Mechadendrit schnappt hilflos nach seinen Krallen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What... are you doing? This is a sacrilegious breach of the Litany of Activation. This is... heresy..." {n}Pasqal's voice grows quiet and hoarse with static, frightened and meek with fascination. The mechadendrite helplessly snaps its claws.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Was... tun Sie da? Das ist ein frevelhafter Verstoß gegen die Litanei der Aktivierung. Das ist... Ketzerei..." {n}Pasqals Stimme wird leise und heiser vor Rauschen, erschrocken und kleinlaut vor Faszination. Der Mechadendrit schnappt hilflos nach seinen Krallen.{/n}

languages.text: "Qu'est-ce que vous faites ? C'est une violation sacrilège de la litanie d'activation. C'est... une hérésie..." {n}La voix de Pasqal devient silencieuse et rauque à cause des parasites, effrayée et mièvre à cause de la fascination. La méchadendrite fait claquer ses griffes, impuissante.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What... are you doing? This is a sacrilegious breach of the Litany of Activation. This is... heresy..." {n}Pasqal's voice grows quiet and hoarse with static, frightened and meek with fascination. The mechadendrite helplessly snaps its claws.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Qu'est-ce que vous faites ? C'est une violation sacrilège de la litanie d'activation. C'est... une hérésie..." {n}La voix de Pasqal devient silencieuse et rauque à cause des parasites, effrayée et mièvre à cause de la fascination. La méchadendrite fait claquer ses griffes, impuissante.{/n}

languages.text: "¿Qué... estás haciendo? Esto es una violación sacrílega de la Letanía de Activación. Esto es... herejía..." {n}La voz de Pasqal se vuelve tranquila y ronca por la estática, asustada y mansa por la fascinación. La mecadendrita chasquea impotente sus garras.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What... are you doing? This is a sacrilegious breach of the Litany of Activation. This is... heresy..." {n}Pasqal's voice grows quiet and hoarse with static, frightened and meek with fascination. The mechadendrite helplessly snaps its claws.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "¿Qué... estás haciendo? Esto es una violación sacrílega de la Letanía de Activación. Esto es... herejía..." {n}La voz de Pasqal se vuelve tranquila y ronca por la estática, asustada y mansa por la fascinación. La mecadendrita chasquea impotente sus garras.{/n}

languages.text: "Ne... yapıyorsunuz? Bu, Etkinleştirme Litanyası'nın saygısızca ihlalidir. Bu... sapkınlık..." {n}Pasqal'ın sesi parazitten boğuklaşıyor, korkuyor ve hayranlıktan uyuşuyor. Mekadendrit çaresizce pençelerini şaklatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What... are you doing? This is a sacrilegious breach of the Litany of Activation. This is... heresy..." {n}Pasqal's voice grows quiet and hoarse with static, frightened and meek with fascination. The mechadendrite helplessly snaps its claws.{/n}
